title: Q1 Results 18th July Live: HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Axis Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, PNB, IDBI Bank, Yes Bank, JK Cement, India Cements to announce Q1 results - The HinduBusinessLine
text:
Q1 Results Today, 18th July 2026 Live Updates: Find all the latest Q1 results 2026 updates of HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Axis Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, Punjab National Bank, IDBI Bank, Yes Bank, J. K. Cement, Punjab and Sind Bank, India Cements and more

Oberoi Realty reports a 29% profit increase to ₹544 crore and total income rises to ₹1,361.69 crore in Q1.

JSW Steel on Friday said its consolidated net profit more than doubled to Rs 4,696 crore in the quarter ended June 30, supported by increase in revenues.

Revenue from operations in the first quarter stood at ₹6,518.19 crore as against ₹5,455.35 crore in the year-ago period

Central Bank of India reports a 13% profit increase to ₹1,324 crore in Q1, alongside improved asset quality.

iQIYI Reports Strong H1 2026 Content Results, Cementing Its Position as China's Premier Streaming Destination

Investors should watch for bank earnings, margin improvements, and leadership changes amid RBI's foreign currency inflow measures.
